MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS SAN FRANCISCO APARTMENT ASSOCIATION, COALITION FOR BETTER HOUSING, SAN FRANCISCO ASSOCIATION OF REALTORS' Motion For Writ Of Mandate And Injunctive And Declaratory Relief is transferred to Department 501, the Real Property Court, to be heard on July 14, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
